name: ethSetLinkStatus
title: ethSetLinkStatus
syntax: long ethSetLinkStatus( long channel, long status ); // form 1
long ethSetLinkStatus( long channel, long hwChannel, long status ); // form 2
long ethSetLinkStatus( ethernetPort port, long status ); // form 3
description: Configures the channel of the Vector hardware to establish or terminate a link.

parameters.name: hwChannel
parameters.description: Hardware channel number. Vector network interface must support more than 1 hardware channel to use.Value range: 1..16

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: Ethernet port, described by network name and port name. Only supported for network-based configurations and physical measurement ports.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
